title: Location Areas, Encounter Relations, Filtering, and Exploration · Execution Trace: Pokedex Go Explore Budget
summary: Explore confuses locations with location areas, requests unbounded encounter data, prints duplicates, ignores empty relations, and loses which area produced each Pokemon. Predict the user decision, Go ownership, command state, API contract, resource budget, failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the pokedex go explore budget increment in provenance-preserving location encounter explorer. Learners progress through prediction, explic…
objectives: Bound response bytes, records processed, output rows, optional filters, cache use, and prefetch concurrency.
Deduplicate Pokemon by stable identity while retaining area, version, method, chance, or condition provenance needed by the view.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
